## About Your Project

**What does it do?**
<!-- 2-3 sentences about what your project does and the problem it solves -->

**Which AgentField features does it use?**
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Reasoners (@app.reasoner)
- [ ] Skills (@app.skill)
- [ ] Cross-agent calls (app.call)
- [ ] Agent discovery (app.discover)
- [ ] Async execution / webhooks
- [ ] Human-in-the-loop (app.pause)
- [ ] Shared memory (app.memory)
- [ ] Harness (app.harness)
- [ ] Cryptographic identity (DIDs)
- [ ] Verifiable credentials
- [ ] Policy enforcement
- [ ] Other: ___

**Architecture overview (optional):**
